message:
build(deps): sync Cargo.lock for subtle crate added to fcp-host

The constant-time admin bearer-token compare fix (1a102e41) added
`subtle = { workspace = true }` to crates/fcp-host/Cargo.toml but did
not carry forward the Cargo.lock delta. This catches the lockfile up
so `cargo build -p fcp-host` against a clean index no longer re-runs
resolution on every invocation.

No behavior change — the `subtle` crate is already in the workspace
dep graph via fcp-bootstrap / fcp-crypto / fcp-oauth / fcp-protocol;
this entry just adds fcp-host to the dependents list for the same
resolved version.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
